scripts.dev: sh -c 'echo "Agent Computer worker runs only inside the Docker image; mount TS source into the container for edit/run feedback." >&2; exit 1'
scripts.start: sh -c 'echo "Agent Computer worker runs only inside the Docker image; use the control-plane Docker worker e2e or docker run." >&2; exit 1'
scripts.lint: bun run fmt:check && bun run type-check
scripts.test: cd ../.. && docker run --rm --cap-add SYS_ADMIN --security-opt seccomp=unconfined --security-opt systempaths=unconfined -v "$PWD/app/agent_computer/src:/repo/app/agent_computer/src:ro" -v "$PWD/app/agent_computer/test:/repo/app/agent_computer/test:ro" ankole-agent-computer:0.1.0 bun test
